plugin.name: grid
plugin.long: Warp and resize windows to fit an imaginary grid

option.name: put_center_key
option.long: Move window to the center.

option.name: put_left_key
option.long: Move window to the left edge.

option.name: put_right_key
option.long: Move window to the right edge.

option.name: put_top_key
option.long: Move window to the top edge.

option.name: put_bottom_key
option.long: Move window to the bottom edge.

option.name: put_topleft_key
option.long: Move window to the top left corner.

option.name: put_topright_key
option.long: Move window to the top right corner.

option.name: put_bottomleft_key
option.long: Move window to the bottom left corner.

option.name: put_bottomright_key
option.long: Move window to the bottom right corner.

option.name: put_maximize_key
option.long: Maximize window.

option.name: put_restore_key
option.long: Restore window to it's original size. Note: Use the same shortcut you are using to unmaximize a window to be able to restore grid-maximized windows.

option.name: left_maximize
option.long: Left vertically maximize window.

option.name: right_maximize
option.long: Right vertically maximize window.

option.name: top_left_corner_action
option.long: Action to be performed when window is dropped on the top left corner.

option.name: top_edge_action
option.long: Action to be performed when window is dropped on the top edge.

option.name: top_right_corner_action
option.long: Action to be performed when window is dropped on the top right corner.

option.name: left_edge_action
option.long: Action to be performed when window is dropped on the left edge.

option.name: right_edge_action
option.long: Action to be performed when window is dropped on the right edge.

option.name: bottom_left_corner_action
option.long: Action to be performed when window is dropped on the bottom left corner.

option.name: bottom_edge_action
option.long: Action to be performed when window is dropped on the bottom edge.

option.name: bottom_right_corner_action
option.long: Action to be performed when window is dropped on the bottom right corner.

option.name: snapback_windows
option.short: Snap Windows Back To Original Size
option.long: Snaps windows back to their original size if dragged away from their gridded position.

option.name: cycle_sizes
option.long: Cycle through multiple different sizes by using the same keyboard shortcut multiple times in a row.

option.name: left_edge_threshold
option.long: Maximum number of pixels from the left edge a window can be dropped.

option.name: right_edge_threshold
option.long: Maximum number of pixels from the right edge a window can be dropped.

option.name: top_edge_threshold
option.long: Maximum number of pixels from the top edge a window can be dropped.

option.name: bottom_edge_threshold
option.long: Maximum number of pixels from the bottom edge a window can be dropped.

option.name: snapoff_threshold
option.long: The pixels to drag until a grid-resized window snaps off.

group.short: ပုံပန်းသဏ္ဍာန်

option.name: draw_indicator
option.long: Draw a window resize indicator preview.

option.name: draw_stretched_window
option.long: Draw a stretched live window content animation.

option.name: animation_duration
option.long: Preview animation duration (in ms).

option.name: use_desktop_average_color
option.long: Try to use the desktop average color if defined by your DE.

option.name: outline_color
option.long: Color and opacity of the resize indicator preview outline.

option.name: fill_color
option.long: Fill color and opacity of the resize indicator preview.

option.name: disable_blend
option.long: Disable blending.
Вимкнути змішування.
